---
title: "06 GO/KEGG Functional Enrichment Analysis"
---

```{r setup, include=FALSE}
# Global rendering configuration for the whole project
knitr::opts_chunk$set(
  echo = TRUE,
  warning = FALSE,
  message = FALSE,
  fig.dpi = 300,
  fig.align = "center"
)
```

# Package Loading
library(tidyverse)
library(clusterProfiler)
library(org.Hs.eg.db)

# Global Parameters
p_cutoff <- 0.05
fdr_cutoff <- 0.01

# Data Import
# Import core hub gene list

# Data Analysis
# 1. Gene ID conversion
# 2. GO/KEGG ORA enrichment analysis
# 3. GSEA gene set enrichment analysis
# 4. Pathway filtering and ranking

# Visualization
# Bubble plot, bar plot, enrichment network plot

# Result Export
# Output enrichment statistics tables and high-resolution figures

# Result Description
# Explain enrichment parameters, correction methods and annotation library
